title: Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology
content:
Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology

Another department has been added to the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences. Thus, starting from the Spring semester of 2023/2024, graduate students will be admitted to the Departments of Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology in addition to the Departments of Forensic Sciences, Criminal Justice and Biosecurity.
